summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of ACE inovations logo integration kit. All 15 core features verified working correctly. Loading animation, LogicNodeIcon, Logo component, and navigation all function as expected.

loading_animation.appears_on_load: PASS - data-testid='loading-animation' present on initial page load
loading_animation.svg_pillars_gradient: PASS - pillarGradL and pillarGradR both have blue (#2E5BFF) to violet (#6D28D9) gradient
loading_animation.completes_and_disappears: PASS - Animation completes in ~3.3 seconds and element is removed
loading_animation.phases_working: PASS - rise → ignite → ripple → shrink → done sequence working

logic_node_icon.navbar_icon: PASS - LogicNodeIcon SVG in navbar (viewBox 0 0 160 160, 4 paths, 3 gradients, 3 circles)
logic_node_icon.footer_icon: PASS - LogicNodeIcon in footer (20px size, smaller, no glow)
logic_node_icon.not_zap_icon: PASS - Old Zap lucide icon replaced with LogicNodeIcon

logo_component.space_grotesk_font: PASS - Logo uses Space Grotesk font family

favicon_and_meta.index_html_title: PASS - Source has 'ACE inovations | Engineering the Next Generation'
favicon_and_meta.index_html_favicon_link: PASS - Source has link rel='icon' type='image/svg+xml' href='favicon.svg'
favicon_and_meta.preview_environment_note: NOTE - Emergent preview overrides title/theme-color/favicon at runtime

navigation.homepage: PASS - Renders correctly after loading animation
navigation.labs_page: PASS - /labs loads with ACE Labs content
navigation.stacks_page: PASS - /stacks loads with ACE Stacks content
navigation.squads_page: PASS - /squads loads with High-Velocity Units heading

header_button.start_project_btn: PASS - Header 'Start a Project' uses header-dark variant

features_verified: Loading animation appears on initial page load (data-testid='loading-animation') ✅
Loading animation shows SVG pillars with blue/violet gradient ✅
Loading animation completes and reveals the homepage ✅
After loading, the LogicNodeIcon SVG appears in the navbar (not the old Zap icon) ✅
Logo wordmark uses Space Grotesk font with 'ACE' bold and 'inovations' light ✅
LogicNodeIcon also appears in the footer (smaller, 20px, no glow) ✅
Favicon is SVG format (favicon.svg exists in public folder) ✅
Page title in source: 'ACE inovations | Engineering the Next Generation' ✅
Homepage renders correctly after loading animation completes ✅
Navigation to /labs works and shows correct page ✅
Navigation to /stacks works and shows correct page ✅
Navigation to /squads works and shows correct page ✅
Header 'Start a Project' button still uses header-dark variant ✅
Brand name 'ACE inovations' (one n, lowercase i) consistent across loading + navbar + footer ✅
context_for_next_testing_agent: Logo integration kit fully implemented: 1) LoadingAnimation component with phase-based animation (rise→ignite→ripple→shrink→done in 3.3s), SVG pillars with blue-violet gradients, violet ripples, and shatter effect. 2) LogicNodeIcon reusable SVG component with unique IDs per instance to avoid gradient conflicts. 3) Logo component combines LogicNodeIcon + Space Grotesk wordmark. 4) Footer uses Logo size='small' (20px icon, no glow). 5) favicon.svg in public folder. Note: Emergent preview environment overrides page title, theme-color, and favicon at runtime, but source files are correctly configured.
